Patch Set 1:

Andreas,

Yes to all of that, -C and having a check on the MDS - This is just a super quick something so Ihara can get a sense of how useful this is.

My intention (as I did in the old version of this patch, but the approach there was pretty thoroughly incompatible with the space hash changes, so I'm just going to start that over) is also to have a layout flag, etc, similar to OST overstriping, so we can be sure when it's intended.

Ideally I'd wait for good benchmark numbers, but I am pretty sure this'll help, so I may just forge on.

Patch Set 1:

And yes, this will break 300K, I imagine?  Like I said, just for Ihara :)

(This is actually me trying your prior suggestion, that we could quickly prototype this with the existing fail loc.)

Patch Set 1:

Ihara,

If you're able to benchmark this soon, that would be great - Then if the results are good, I'll be comfortable finishing the other one & asking people to review it.

Patch Set 1:

Code-wise looks good to me.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

This change cannot be cherry-picked to master.
Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.

Abandoned

Abandon in favor of https://review.whamcloud.com/35034

parents.subject: LU-11011 osc: add preferred checksum type support

commit.subject: LU-12273 lod: Trivial metadata overstriping
commit.message:
LU-12273 lod: Trivial metadata overstriping

With this change, setting this fail loc is sufficient to
allow running mdtest with metadata overstriping.

Example:
lctl set_param fail_loc=0x1703
lfs setdirstripe -D -i 0 -c 12 newdir

This sets a default layout which will create a twelve
stripe directory like this (4 MDTs):

newdir/newdir2/
lmv_stripe_count: 12 lmv_stripe_offset: 0 lmv_hash_type: fnv_1a_64
mdtidx           FID[seq:oid:ver]
     0           [0x200000400:0x5:0x0]
     1           [0x240000403:0x5:0x0]
     2           [0x280000403:0x5:0x0]
     3           [0x2c0000403:0x5:0x0]
     0           [0x200000400:0x6:0x0]
     1           [0x240000403:0x6:0x0]
     2           [0x280000403:0x6:0x0]
     3           [0x2c0000403:0x6:0x0]
     0           [0x200000400:0x7:0x0]
     1           [0x240000403:0x7:0x0]
     2           [0x280000403:0x7:0x0]
     3           [0x2c0000403:0x7:0x0]

This is sufficient for testing.

Note the 5 directories per MDT limit still applies!  More
than that will cause panics.

test-parameters: fortestonly

Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I0306d4fef876e783ff05d93634d8a4ef552bed18
